_publications._publicationTitle: Genomic imbalance of HMMR/RHAMM regulates the sensitivity and response of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumour cells to aurora kinase inhibition.

_contextSnippet: achieved stable reduction of approximately 65% of RHAMM protein after drug selection
details: Stable reduction of approximately 65% of RHAMM protein achieved after drug selection with redundant constructs (shR1 and shR2)
